<!-- wp:divi/code {"module":{"advanced":{"htmlAttributes":{"desktop":{"value":{"class":"pharmacy-section6-css","id":""}}}}},"content":{"innerContent":{"desktop":{"value":"\u003cstyle\u003e\n@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700;800\u0026family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700\u0026display=swap');\n:root{\u002d\u002dprimary:#0E7490;\u002d\u002dsecondary:#14B8A6;\u002d\u002ddark:#0F172A;\u002d\u002dmuted:#5B6B7C;\u002d\u002dff-head:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;\u002d\u002dff-body:'Inter',sans-serif;\u002d\u002dgrad-main:linear-gradient(135deg,var(\u002d\u002dprimary),var(\u002d\u002dsecondary));\u002d\u002dshadow-soft:0 20px 50px -22px rgba(14,60,90,.22);\u002d\u002dshadow-strong:0 30px 70px -20px rgba(14,60,90,.35)}\n.pharmacy-expert-sec{background:#eaf2f8!important;padding:105px 0!important;overflow:hidden!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-css-row{display:none!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-row{max-width:1320px!important;width:90%!important;margin:auto!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.05fr) minmax(420px,.95fr)!important;gap:70px!important;align-items:center!important;padding:0!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-cards-col,.pharmacy-expert-content-col{width:auto!important;max-width:none!important;float:none!important;margin:0!important;padding:0!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-cards-col .et_pb_column{width:auto!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-card-wrap{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))!important;gap:32px!important;align-items:stretch!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-card{background:#fff!important;border-radius:22px!important;text-align:center!important;padding:0 38px 40px!important;min-height:330px!important;box-shadow:var(\u002d\u002dshadow-soft)!important;transition:.35s!important;margin-top:54px!important;overflow:visible!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-card:hover{transform:translateY(-10px)!important;box-shadow:var(\u002d\u002dshadow-strong)!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-photo{width:175px;height:175px;border-radius:50%;margin:-54px auto 28px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d8eef8,#fff);border:8px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 22px 45px -24px rgba(14,60,90,.45);display:grid;place-items:center;overflow:hidden}\n.pharmacy-expert-photo span{font-size:2.4rem;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head);font-weight:800;color:var(\u002d\u002dprimary)}\n.pharmacy-expert-card-title h3{font-size:1.55rem!important;color:#10233f!important;margin:0 0 14px!important;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head)!important;font-weight:800!important;line-height:1.15!important}.pharmacy-expert-card-text,.pharmacy-expert-card-text p{color:#7b8794!important;line-height:1.65!important;font-size:.98rem!important;margin:0!important;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-body)!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-social-row{display:flex!important;justify-content:center!important;gap:12px!important;margin-top:24px!important}.pharmacy-social-btn{width:36px!important;height:36px!important;border-radius:50%!important;border:1px solid #dbe6ee!important;display:grid!important;place-items:center!important;color:#768391!important;background:#fff!important;font-weight:700!important;font-size:.8rem!important;padding:0!important;margin:0!important;line-height:34px!important}.pharmacy-social-btn:hover{background:var(\u002d\u002dgrad-main)!important;color:#fff!important;border-color:transparent!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-eyebrow,.pharmacy-expert-eyebrow p{color:var(\u002d\u002dprimary)!important;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head)!important;font-weight:800!important;font-size:.72rem!important;letter-spacing:.14em!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;margin-bottom:18px!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-heading h2{font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.1rem)!important;color:#10233f!important;margin-bottom:24px!important;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head)!important;font-weight:800!important;line-height:1.15!important;letter-spacing:-.02em!important}.pharmacy-expert-line{height:1px!important;background:rgba(14,116,144,.18)!important;margin:0 0 50px!important;border:0!important}.pharmacy-expert-subheading h3{font-size:1.2rem!important;color:#10233f!important;margin-bottom:14px!important;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-head)!important;font-weight:800!important}.pharmacy-expert-text,.pharmacy-expert-text p{color:#6b7785!important;line-height:1.8!important;margin-bottom:30px!important;font-family:var(\u002d\u002dff-body)!important;font-size:1rem!important;max-width:520px!important}\n.pharmacy-expert-arrows{display:flex!important;gap:14px!important}.pharmacy-expert-arrow{width:58px!important;height:58px!important;border-radius:50%!important;border:1px solid #dbe6ee!important;background:#fff!important;color:#10233f!important;font-size:24px!important;line-height:54px!important;text-align:center!important;padding:0!important;transition:.25s!important;display:inline-flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important}.pharmacy-expert-arrow:hover{background:var(\u002d\u002dgrad-main)!important;color:#fff!important;border-color:transparent!important;transform:translateY(-3px)!important}\n@media(max-width:1100px){.pharmacy-expert-row{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;gap:50px!important}.pharmacy-expert-content-col{order:2}.pharmacy-expert-cards-col{order:1}}\n@media(max-width:720px){.pharmacy-expert-sec{padding:80px 0!important}.pharmacy-expert-card-wrap{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}.pharmacy-expert-card{margin-top:55px!important}.pharmacy-expert-heading h2{font-size:2.15rem!important}}\n\u003c/style\u003e"}}},"builderVersion":"5.0.0-public-alpha.23","modulePreset":["default"]} /-->
